fields.paper_left: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra: subagents collaborating mid-task
fields.paper_right: gpt-4 plus 'use subagents proactively' in the system prompt

narrative_summary: The joke deflates the hype of 'Ultra' mode by revealing it's essentially one extra instruction line in a prompt, making it a textbook 'same picture' repackaging gag.
rationale: Candidate 4 earns the highest punchline score because swapping 'base model + one line' for the specific callback to 'gpt-4' sharpens the absurdity — it implies the Ultra tier isn't even a new model, just an old one with a sticky note. The surprise bump comes from that unexpected downgrade framing, which lands harder than the others' neutral restatements.
story_title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra will be in Codex
